name: narf-ioutils

metadata.name: narf-ioutils
metadata.summary: Storage of objects in h5py files with lazy reading.

documentation: # ioutils

functions.name: narf.ioutils.get_histogram_view
documentation: Return a view to the contents of a histogram, suitable for use with PickleBuffer or H5Buffer.
functions below are a workaround for suboptimal pickling of bh.Histogram
which doesn't properly use the out-of-band-mechanism and which can't adopt external buffers

functions.name: narf.ioutils.make_Histogram
documentation: Reconstruct a Histogram given constructor arguments and an io-like object with a readinto method.

functions.name: narf.ioutils.reduce_Histogram
documentation: Custom reduction function for Histogram storing the constructor arguments and an H5Buffer of the contents.

functions.name: narf.ioutils.make_Hist
documentation: Reconstruct a Hist given constructor arguments and an io-like object with a readinto method.

functions.name: narf.ioutils.reduce_Hist
documentation: Custom reduction function for Hist storing the constructor arguments and an H5Buffer of the contents.

functions.name: narf.ioutils.pickle_dump_h5py
documentation: Write an object to a new h5py group which will be created within the provided group.

functions.name: narf.ioutils.pickle_load_h5py
documentation: Load an object from the h5py group which contains it.

classes.name: narf.ioutils.H5PickleProxy
documentation: Allows storage of objects in h5py files with lazy reading.

classes.name: narf.ioutils.H5Buffer
documentation:
Signals out-of-band storage of buffers in h5py files during pickling.

The corresponding data can later be read back directly from the file using readinto.
The provides an efficient mechanism for restoring objects which are not able to adopt
external buffers.

classes.name: narf.ioutils.H5Path
documentation: Lightweight softlink object storing the path to an h5py group or dataset within an hdf5 file.

classes.name: narf.ioutils.H5IO
documentation: Provides and io-like interface for reading and writing to a resizable h5py dataset.

classes.name: narf.ioutils.H5Pickler

methods.name: narf.ioutils.H5Pickler.reduce_H5PickleProxy
documentation:
Custom reduce function for H5PickleProxy.

The proxied object is written out-of-band from the main pickle stream.
The H5PickleProxy object is read back with only the group object where the proxied object can be lazily read back from.

methods.name: narf.ioutils.H5Pickler.reduce_H5Buffer
documentation:
Custom reduce function for H5Buffer.

The corresponding buffer is written out-of-band from the main pickle stream.
The H5Buffer object is read back with only the dataset object where the underlying data can
be read back when needed (and directly into an existing buffer if desired).

methods.name: narf.ioutils.H5Pickler.persistent_id
documentation: Handle storage of h5py group or dataset as H5Path.

Implements pickling to h5py file.

Includes support for additional out-of-band storage for proxy objects and buffers which need
to be read back directly from the file.  h5py groups and datasets can also be stored via H5Path softlink

classes.name: narf.ioutils.H5Unpickler

methods.name: narf.ioutils.H5Unpickler.persistent_load
documentation: Handle retrieval of h5py group or dataset via H5Path.

Implements unpickling from an h5py file.

Includes support for reading back references to h5py groups and datasets stored as H5Path softlinks.
